description_long: This is a dark green armored tracked vehicle resembling a Soviet-era main battle tank, featuring a large, rounded turret mounted centrally on a rectangular chassis. The turret is equipped with a long, cylindrical main cannon extending forward, and a smaller secondary hatch or cupola is visible on top. The hull is robust, with angular armor plating and prominent side skirts partially covering the suspension and road wheels. The vehicle rides on a set of six large, evenly spaced road wheels on each side, connected by a continuous metal track system designed for traversing rough terrain. The rear of the vehicle features a sloped engine deck and exhaust outlets, while the front is characterized by a sloped glacis plate for deflecting projectiles. The overall design emphasizes durability, protection, and off-road mobility, making it suitable for both urban and rugged environments.
description: A dark green armored tracked tank with a large turret, long cannon, and six road wheels per side, built for off-road and urban mobility.
description_view_0: The left-front view highlights the long cannon, rounded turret, and the left track system with six visible road wheels.
description_view_1: The right-rear view shows the sloped engine deck, rear armor, and the right track system, with the turret and cannon facing forward.
description_view_2: The right-front view emphasizes the angular front armor, turret, and the right-side track and wheels.
description_view_3: The left-rear view displays the rear armor, left track, and the turret with the cannon pointing forward.
attribute_tire_tread_pattern: The tracks feature a blocky, all-terrain tread pattern designed for maximum traction on both soft and hard surfaces, with prominent raised sections for grip.
